description: It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into these ankle socks from playboy. Made of a blended fabric with built in sanitised antimicrobial protection, these beige socks can be worn both for formal and casual occasions and remains hygienically fresh, keeping unpleasant odours away. Made of blended fabric for all-day comfort, easy stretch and sweat-free wear Seamless stitch for abrasion-free wear Rib knit cuff with branding and a roomy toe area for superior comfort and durability Procured from authorized channel partner of Sri SR Mill, Tanuku (AP) – the India licensee for Playboy Men’s Underwear Sock care Machine wash cold with like colours using mild detergent Do not iron, dry clean or tumble dry Dry in shade
